import { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom' import StarWarsAPI from '../services/StarWarsAPI' import Card from 'react-bootstrap/Card' import CardBody from 'react-bootstrap/Card' import Button from 'react-bootstrap/Button' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' import Table from 'react-bootstrap/Table' import ListGroup from 'react-bootstrap/ListGroup' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const Character = () => { const [character, setCharacter] = useState() const { id } = useParams() const history = useNavigate(); const getCharacter = async (id) => { const data = await StarWarsAPI.getCharacter(id) setCharacter(data) } useEffect(() => { getCharacter(id) }, [id]) if (!character) { return

Loading...

} return ( <> {character && ( {character.name} Attributes
Gender {character.gender}
Birth Year {character.birth_year}
Height {character.height}
Mass {character.mass}
Hair color {character.hair_color}
Skin color {character.skin_color}
Eye color {character.eye_color}
Links
Films {character.films.map((film, index) => Film {index} {`>>`} )}
)} {!character && (

No character!

)} ) } export default Character
